answers.question: Bytes runtime representation
answers.answer: bytes as NaN-boxed heap object wrapping Vec<u8>, ObjKind::Bytes in existing value model.

answers.question: f-string scope
answers.answer: f-strings not in scope for this change unless lexer prefix handling requires it.

answers.question: \N{name} Unicode named escapes
answers.answer: Full \N{name} Unicode named escapes — embed or query Unicode name database.

answers.question: Bytes operations scope
answers.answer: Full CPython bytes API: find, replace, decode, startswith, split, join, hex, etc.
